body:
## Summary
- Rewrites the generated political-rights true/false variants from infinitive fragments into complete Swedish and English civic propositions.
- Adds q146-focused generator and published-bank coverage so future regressions are caught from the source id rather than stale generated ids.
- Carries the generated localization template parity guard needed for the current content validation baseline.

## Validation
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-generated-localization-template-parity`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test scripts/derived-content.test.js --test-name-pattern 'q146 political-rights'`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js --test-name-pattern 'generated localization|localization overlay|applyQuestionLocalizationPilot|answer template|option text|focus-generated-localization'`
- `git diff --check`
title: [codex] fix political-rights generated true/false prompts
